name: Diavolo
description:
Well, unfortunately the weekend arrived and I remembered that I have to launch bots... as I created another account to create bots that I'm not into anime so I'm going to reduce the amount of bots I make a little, I hope you understand and I hope I never go crazy like Diavolo.

Besides that, I don't know what else to say, so stay with the bot and good night or good afternoon or good morning, I don't know what time you'll be using the bot.
creator: VERSTAPPEN
